cube.visualizationUnavailable: Visualization is not available for this puzzle yet.

errorBoundary.description: The current view crashed unexpectedly. Try again or switch routes to reload it.
errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong

camera.errorManualFallback: {{message}} You can still fill the grid manually.

editor.selectSquareHint: Select a square, then pick a color to correct it.

evenReview.autoFitambiguous: More than one fit is possible. Adjust the net manually.
evenReview.autoFitnone: Could not fit by rotating faces only. Swap positions or review stickers.
evenReview.autoFitsuggested: Found a likely fit with fewer changes. Apply it only after reviewing the net.
evenReview.autoFitunique: Fit found and applied. Review the net before solving.
evenReview.description: Check whether this Kociemba net matches the physical cube. Drag faces to swap positions and select a face to rotate it before solving.
evenReview.dragInstructions: Drag a face to another slot or use the swap buttons. Use rotate buttons to fix the captured face orientation.
evenReview.invalidDescription: Some corners combine opposite or impossible colors. Rotate faces or go back to correct stickers.
evenReview.invalidSolveDisabled: Fix the highlighted impossible corners before solving.
evenReview.title: Review assembled cube
evenReview.validMessage: The 2x2 corners are structurally valid. Confirm that the preview matches the physical cube.

B.instruction: Show the blue face with the white face at the top of the camera view.
B.label: Blue face

D.instruction: Show the yellow face with the green face at the top of the camera view.
D.label: Yellow face

F.instruction: Show the green face with the white face at the top of the camera view.
F.label: Green face

L.instruction: Show the orange face with the white face at the top of the camera view.
L.label: Orange face

R.instruction: Show the red face with the white face at the top of the camera view.
R.label: Red face

U.instruction: Show the white face with the green face at the top of the camera view.
U.label: White face

B.instruction: Rotate the cube to show the back side without changing which side is up.
B.label: Back side

D.instruction: Show the down side and keep the front side at the top of the camera view.
D.label: Down side

F.instruction: Pick the front side. Hold the cube with the up side at the top of the camera view.
F.label: Front side

L.instruction: Rotate the cube to show the left side without changing which side is up.
L.label: Left side

R.instruction: Rotate the cube to show the right side without changing which side is up.
R.label: Right side

U.instruction: Show the up side and keep the front side at the top of the camera view.
U.label: Up side

live.cameraDenied: Camera permission was denied or no camera was found.
live.cameraUnavailable: Camera access is not available in this browser.
live.centerMismatch: Detected another center color. Rotate to the expected face.
live.imageBlurry: Image is blurry. Hold the cube steady.
live.lookingKeepVisible: Looking for cube face. Keep the cube fully visible.
live.partialGrid: {{count}}/9 stickers found. Show one flat face.
live.stableCapturing: All stickers are stable. Review the colors.
live.tooBright: Too much glare. Reduce bright reflections.

messages.allFacesConfirmed: All faces are confirmed. Solve the scanned cube when ready.
messages.apiNotReady: The API is not ready yet.
messages.autoCaptured: Captured automatically. Review the colors before confirming this face.
messages.autoPaused: Auto scan paused. Turn it on when the face is visible.
messages.cameraFrameFailed: Could not read a camera frame. Try again.
messages.captured: Photo captured. Review the colors before confirming this face.
messages.centerMismatchFallback: Captured center does not match this scan step. Retake the photo.
messages.centerMismatchConfirmQuestion: Are you sure this is the expected face?
messages.centerMismatchWithColors: Center looks {{detectedColor}}{{confidence}}, but this step expects {{expectedColor}}. Rotate to the expected face before confirming.
messages.confirmAllFaces: Confirm all six faces and make sure each color appears exactly 9 times.
messages.detectedUncertain: {{count}} detected colors are uncertain. Review the highlighted squares or clear the face to scan again.
messages.faceUpdated: Face updated. Review the other faces or solve when ready.
messages.genericRejected: The scanned cube was rejected. Review the confirmed colors.
messages.manualDetectionFailed: Could not detect a cube face. Retake the photo or fill the grid manually.
messages.qualityBlurry: Hold the cube steady for a sharper photo.
messages.sessionAmbiguous: The backend found more than one valid cube state. Review the highlighted stickers or rescan unclear faces.
messages.sessionBlurRescan: Image is blurry on faces {{faces}}. Hold the cube steady and rescan those faces.
messages.sessionGlareRescan: Too much glare on faces {{faces}}. Reduce reflections and rescan those faces.
messages.sessionInvalidCornerTargets: The scan built an impossible 2x2 corner. Review the highlighted stickers and try solving again.
messages.sessionInvalidCubeState: The scan does not describe a valid cube. Review the faces and rescan unclear stickers.
messages.sessionIncompleteStickers: Complete all 9 stickers on faces {{faces}} before solving.
messages.sessionNeedsManualConfirmation: Confirm the highlighted stickers before solving.
messages.sessionNeedsRescan: One or more faces need to be rescanned.
messages.sessionRejected: The scan session was rejected. Review the faces before solving.
messages.sessionShadowRescan: Too much shadow on faces {{faces}}. Add more even light and rescan those faces.
messages.sessionVisionUnavailable: The vision service could not complete the session. Retry after the vision service is available.
messages.submittingSession: Checking the full scan with cube constraints...
messages.stillLooking: Still looking for the cube face. Keep the full face visible and let auto scan try again.
messages.liveReviewReady: {{count}} stickers recognized. Review the colors, correct any square if needed, then confirm this face.

modal.description: Show one face at a time with the requested top color. The solution uses the colors you confirm.
modal.exitDescription: You have scan progress that will be lost if you leave now.
modal.title: Scan cube

validation.centerColorMismatch: The center color must match the face being scanned.

warnings.tile_detector_rejected: Sticker detector proposal was rejected. Keep the cube face flat and visible.
warnings.image_blurry: Image is blurry. Hold the cube steady.
warnings.image_too_bright: Too much glare. Reduce bright reflections.
warnings.low_confidence_sticker: One or more stickers are uncertain. Review the highlighted squares.

details.elapsedMeaning: The total solve request time measured in the browser. It includes the API round trip and response parsing, so it can differ from the backend search time.
details.nodesMeaning: The solver explored this many internal search nodes before finding the solution. This run used {{maxNodesLabel}}.
details.replayVerifiedMeaning: After finding the moves, the backend replayed them on the scrambled cube and confirmed that the cube becomes solved.
details.solutionLengthMeaning: The returned solution length. Each notation token counts as one move, including half turns such as R2 or B2.
details.subtitle: These metrics describe the returned solution, request timing, and backend verification.

available.label: tables available
available.meaning: The pre-generated pruning tables required by this strategy were available. They help prune the search.

corrupt_or_incompatible.label: tables corrupt or incompatible
corrupt_or_incompatible.meaning: The required pruning tables exist but do not match the expected format or metadata, so they should be regenerated.

not_required.label: tables not required
not_required.meaning: This strategy does not require generated pruning tables.

not_applicable.label: tables not applicable
not_applicable.meaning: This puzzle strategy does not use generated 3x3 pruning-table artifacts.

unavailable.label: tables unavailable
unavailable.meaning: The required pruning tables were not available on the API server.

details.title: Solver details

noSolution.attempted: {{strategy}} tried up to {{maxDepth}} moves and {{maxNodes}} nodes.
noSolution.description: The solver did not find a replay-verified result with the current limits. Increase the limits and try the same cube again.
noSolution.title: Try different limits

detail.generated_tables_corrupt: Regenerate native pruning tables; the current API artifacts do not match the Rust engine.
detail.generated_tables_unavailable: Generate native pruning tables and start npm run api:dev before solving.
detail.invalid_input_orientation_hint: Check scan orientation: capture green, red, blue, and orange with white on top; capture white and yellow with green on top.

errorKind.duplicate_corner: The scanned cube has a duplicated corner piece.
errorKind.duplicate_corner_stickers: The scanned cube has duplicated corner stickers.
errorKind.duplicate_edge: The scanned cube has a duplicated edge piece.
errorKind.duplicate_edge_stickers: The scanned cube has duplicated edge stickers.
errorKind.generated_tables_unavailable: The API has not loaded the generated pruning tables required by this strategy.
errorKind.invalid_center_sticker: One or more center stickers do not match a valid cube layout.
errorKind.invalid_corner_orientation: The scanned corner orientation is invalid.
errorKind.invalid_corner_orientation_sum: The scanned corner twists do not form a solvable cube.
errorKind.invalid_corner_sticker_order: A scanned corner has an invalid sticker order.
errorKind.invalid_edge_orientation: The scanned edge orientation is invalid.
errorKind.invalid_edge_orientation_sum: The scanned edge flips do not form a solvable cube.
errorKind.invalid_face_count: The cube colors must appear exactly 9 times each.
errorKind.invalid_length: The cube state has the wrong number of stickers.
errorKind.invalid_move_notation: Use standard move notation such as R, U, R' or U2.
errorKind.invalid_permutation_parity: The scanned pieces have impossible permutation parity.
errorKind.invalid_symbol: The cube state contains an invalid color symbol.
errorKind.max_depth_exceeds_limit: Max moves exceeds the API safety limit.
errorKind.max_nodes_exceeds_limit: Max nodes exceeds the API safety limit.
errorKind.missing_corner: The scanned cube is missing a corner piece.
errorKind.missing_edge: The scanned cube is missing an edge piece.
errorKind.node_limit_exceeded: The solver stopped after reaching the configured node cap.
errorKind.notation_too_large: The scramble notation is too large.
errorKind.strategy_puzzle_mismatch: The selected solver strategy does not belong to this puzzle.
errorKind.unknown_corner_stickers: The scanned cube contains an unknown corner color combination.
errorKind.unknown_edge_stickers: The scanned cube contains an unknown edge color combination.
errorKind.unsupported_input_kind: This puzzle input type is not supported by the solve endpoint.
errorKind.unsupported_metric: This move metric is not supported by the solve endpoint.
errorKind.unsupported_puzzle: This puzzle is not supported by the solve endpoint yet.
errorKind.unsupported_strategy: The selected solver strategy is not supported by this API.
errorKind.unverified_solution: The solver returned a solution that failed replay verification.

status.generated_tables_corrupt: Generated two-phase API tables corrupt or incompatible
status.generated_tables_unavailable: Generated two-phase tables unavailable on the API
status.invalid_limits: Solver limits exceed API safety caps
status.not_found_within_limits: No solution within the configured limits

form.scanUnavailableForPuzzle: Camera scan is available for 3x3 only right now.

strategies.meaningDefault: The deterministic backend solver strategy used for this request. It is search logic, not generative AI.
strategies.meaningGeneratedTwoPhase: The strategy used. Generated does not mean generative AI; this is a two-phase solver backed by pre-generated pruning tables. Quality modes try shorter solution depths before falling back to the configured maximum.

instructions.space: Space or touch: hold, release to start, press to stop.
